ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-25-2018 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-04-2018 Continued To Jun-25-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jon Rank appeared by telephone for Marianne Bachus-John (Petitioner).

Mr. Rank stated that he filed a supplemental declaration in support of the ending cash balance and a supplemental declaration in support of the petition, and that the money is still in the Attorney Trust account. The Court informed Counsel that the money needs to be in an estate account, that it does not look kindly on money being taken out of the estate and that he needs to file proof of deposit. The Petition for Order for Approval of First and Final Report of Administrator, etc. is continued to June 25, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
